name: Vidalia Onion Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onions in butter until soft.
2. Combine eggs and sour cream in a large bowl.
3. Add onions and butter to the egg mixture.
4. Season with salt, pepper, and Tabasco sauce.
5. Pour the mixture into the pie shell.
6. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese on top.
7. Bake at 450°F for 20 minutes.
8. Reduce heat to 325°F and bake an additional 20 minutes or until set.
